mapper.update: UPDATE annotation_exports SET status = #{status}, file_url = #{fileUrl}, file_size = #{fileSize}, file_name = #{fileName}, total_bookmarks = #{totalBookmarks}, total_highlights = #{totalHighlights}, total_notes = #{totalNotes}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, started_at = #{startedAt}, completed_at = #{completedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
